categories.name: Productivity
categories.description: Get things done without creating accounts

categories.name: Design & Graphics
categories.description: Create visuals right in your browser

categories.name: Development
categories.description: Code, query, and build in the browser

categories.name: Privacy & Security
categories.description: Protect your data without trusting servers

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: Handy one-off tools for everyday tasks

tools.name: Excalidraw
tools.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams. End-to-end encrypted. Collaborative without accounts.

tools.name: CryptPad
tools.description: Collaborative documents, spreadsheets, polls, whiteboards. End-to-end encrypted. Zero-knowledge architecture.

tools.name: Grist
tools.description: Modern open-source spreadsheet-database hybrid with relational tables, formulas, and Python support.

tools.name: Datasette Lite
tools.description: Run SQLite databases entirely in the browser. Query, explore, and publish data locally with no backend.

tools.name: RAWGraphs
tools.description: Open-source data visualization framework for creating custom charts and exporting publication-ready graphics.

tools.name: drawDB
tools.description: Visual database schema editor that runs in the browser. Design ER diagrams and export SQL instantly.

tools.name: Graphite
tools.description: Modern vector and raster graphics editor with procedural workflows. Built as an open-source alternative to Figma and Illustrator.

tools.name: Mermaid Live
tools.description: Live editor for Mermaid diagrams. Create flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and architecture diagrams from text.

tools.name: privacy.sexy
tools.description: Automated privacy and security configuration tool for Windows, macOS, and Linux systems.

tools.name: OpenCut
tools.description: Open-source browser-based video editor with timeline editing, transitions, and export support.

tools.name: SVG-Edit
tools.description: Browser-based SVG editor for creating and editing scalable vector graphics without uploads.

tools.name: Method Draw
tools.description: Simple and lightweight SVG editor for quick vector illustrations directly in the browser.

tools.name: Piskel
tools.description: Free online pixel art and animated sprite editor with layers, previews, and export tools.

tools.name: Browserpad
tools.description: Minimal privacy-focused notepad that stores everything locally in your browser.

tools.name: ProtectedText
tools.description: Encrypted online notepad where only your password can decrypt your notes.

tools.name: Cryptii
tools.description: Visual encoding, decoding, encryption, and conversion playground for developers and security enthusiasts.

tools.name: Markdown Live Preview
tools.description: Real-time Markdown editor and previewer with export and formatting support.

tools.name: EtherCalc
tools.description: Collaborative spreadsheet tool running entirely in the browser with real-time editing.

tools.name: Dillinger
tools.description: Cloud-enabled Markdown editor with live preview and export integrations.

tools.name: StackEdit
tools.description: Powerful in-browser Markdown editor with synchronization and offline support.

tools.name: Resume Nation
tools.description: Privacy-friendly resume builder that works entirely in-browser and exports polished resumes.

tools.name: JS Bin
tools.description: Collaborative JavaScript sandbox for testing HTML, CSS, and JS snippets live.

tools.name: Python Tutor
tools.description: Visualize code execution step-by-step to better understand programming concepts and debugging.

tools.name: DartPad
tools.description: Interactive Dart and Flutter playground running completely in the browser.

tools.name: Pandoc Try
tools.description: Online playground for converting between document formats using Pandoc.

tools.name: Notepad PWA
tools.description: Offline-capable browser notepad app with installable PWA support.

tools.name: JSPaint
tools.description: Faithful recreation of classic MS Paint in the browser with modern enhancements.

tools.name: PixelCraft
tools.description: Pixel art editor and animation creation tool. Export to spritesheets. Runs entirely client-side.
